use_codes.desc: USE OF PACRITINIB FOR INHIBITING JANUS ASSOCIATED KINASE 2(JAK2)

indications.text:
VONJO is indicated for the treatment of adults with intermediate or high-risk primary or
secondary (post-polycythemia vera or post-essential thrombocythemia) myelofibrosis (MF) with
a platelet count below 50 × 109/L.
This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on spleen volume reduc...
